name: Facility Mailing Address and Parent Company Configuration
description:
Open EPA Tier2 Submit 2025. Create a new facility named 'Gulf Coast Petroleum Storage Depot'.

First, in the Physical Address section, enter:
- Street: 4200 Refinery Road
- City: Port Arthur
- State: TX
- Zip: 77642
- County: Jefferson

Next, configure the corporate mailing address to be DIFFERENT from the physical address. Navigate to the Mailing Address section, ensure any 'same as physical' option is unchecked, and enter:
- Mailing Street: P.O. Box 9400
- Mailing City: Houston
- Mailing State: TX
- Mailing Zip: 77210-9400

Enter the Facility Identification numbers:
- DUNS Number: 156834027
- FRS ID (EPA Registry ID): 110042857693

Navigate to the Parent Company section and enter:
- Parent Company Name: Continental Petrochemical Holdings, Inc.
- Parent Company DUNS: 078213564

When you are finished, create/export the submission file and save it EXACTLY to:
C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\Tier2Output\gulf_coast_depot.t2s
